hero.badge: The Modern Indian Blood Donation Platform
hero.title: Find verified blood donors faster when the window is tight.
hero.subtitle: Donorix combines urgency scoring, karma-backed trust, privacy-safe donor matching, and multilingual support for recipients across India.
hero.feedSubtitle: Emergency posts are ranked first, followed by urgency, freshness, and community trust.
hero.featureOneBody: Consent-aware profiles, 90-day donation cooldown, and public reputation signals.
hero.featureTwoBody: Critical requests rise to the top and unlock direct contact when medically urgent.
hero.featureThreeBody: English and Hindi today, with architecture ready for 28+ Indian languages.

feed.title: Find verified blood donors faster when the window is tight.
feed.subtitle: Donorix combines urgency scoring, karma-backed trust, privacy-safe donor matching, and multilingual support for recipients across India.
feed.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient, blood type, hospital, or city
feed.emptySubtitle: The next verified request will appear here in real time.
feed.noMatches: No blood requests match the current search or filter.
feed.noMatchesCompatible: No compatible requests were found for {bloodType}.
feed.noMatchesGeneral: No requests match the current search or filter.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Match alerts, donor approvals, expiry reminders, and admin notices.
notifications.sectionSubtitle: Match alerts, approvals, reminders, and policy updates.
notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Blood matches, approvals, and reminders will appear here.

leaderboard.title: Karma leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Ranked by verified donations, responsive participation, and zero no-shows.
leaderboard.empty: Leaderboard unlocks once verified donations begin flowing through the platform.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage notifications, language, privacy, theme, and account controls from one place.
settings.themeDescription: Choose the color mode that fits your environment best.
settings.notificationSmsBody: Receive urgent donor and request alerts via SMS when that integration is enabled.
settings.notificationPushBody: Get in-app notifications for approvals, matches, and request status changes.
settings.notificationEmailBody: Receive account and safety updates by email.
settings.languageHint: Hindi and English update the full UI today. More languages coming soon.
settings.radiusBody: Control how far Donorix should look for matches before automatic expansion.
settings.privacyDiscoverableBody: Allow your public profile to appear in donor matching and public rankings.
settings.privacyDirectContactBody: Reveal your direct contact details only when an emergency approval is granted.
settings.privacyLeaderboardBody: Opt out of the public donor leaderboard while keeping emergency matching enabled.

assistant.title: Donorix Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask anything, or start with a quick prompt
assistant.placeholder: Ask anything about Donorix or the question on your mind
assistant.intro: Ask me anything about Donorix or whatever you're trying to figure out. I can answer general questions too.
assistant.fallback: I can help with Donorix questions, general questions, or the next step you want to take.
assistant.guestQuickActions: Ask what I can help with
assistant.draftReadyHint: All required details are captured. Review the summary, then confirm the post.
assistant.draftHold: I need the missing details above before I can publish this request.
assistant.publishSuccess: The request is published. I refreshed your dashboard.
assistant.publishFailed: I couldn't publish the request yet. Please try again.

sidebar.subtitle: Urgent care starts with faster matching.
sidebar.emergencyBody: Requests marked emergency receive priority scoring, contact unlock, and expanded notification reach.
sidebar.donorWorkspaceDesc: Track active requests, matches, and your donation history.
sidebar.hospitalWorkspaceDesc: Patient posts, applicants, and notification workflows.
sidebar.hospitalOperationsDesc: Hospitals can manage requests, donors, and fulfilment from one workspace.
sidebar.emergencyRoutingDesc: Urgent requests receive priority scoring, direct contact, and broader alerts.

header.donorTagline: Purpose-built blood donation matching for India

request.currentlyNotEligible: You are currently not eligible to donate.
request.donorApplicationsEmpty: Donor applications will appear here after volunteers respond.

rightRail.topDonorsEmpty: Leaderboard entries will appear once verified donations begin flowing.
rightRail.hospitalGuideBody: Hospital accounts can post verified patient requests, review donor applicants, and manage fulfilment without entering the public karma system.
rightRail.aboutDonorixBody: Donorix is built for emergency blood coordination in India, with consent-aware onboarding, location-based matching, and trust signals that help urgent requests move faster.
rightRail.verificationBody: Hospitals begin unverified and can be reviewed by Donorix admins before trust badges appear across requests.

home.hospitalTitle: Manage urgent patient requests from one verified hospital dashboard.
home.hospitalSubtitle: Create blood requests, review donor applicants, and monitor fulfilment without exposing hospital coordination to the public donor leaderboard.
home.recentPatientRequestsSubtitle: Active and recent requests sorted by patient name or case reference.
home.latestDonorApplicantsSubtitle: Recent donor responses across your hospital's active posts.
home.donorApplicationsEmpty: Donor applications will appear here after matched donors respond to your requests.
home.noPatientRequests: No patient requests yet. Create your first request to start donor outreach.

hospitalPosts.title: Patient Post History
hospitalPosts.subtitle: All requests created by your hospital, with a clear fulfillment status on each post.

hospitalDonors.title: Pending Requests
hospitalDonors.subtitle: Review donor applications and approve or reject the best match for each patient post.
hospitalDonors.empty: Donor applications will appear here after matched donors respond.

footer.tagline: The Modern Indian Blood Donation Platform
footer.sdg: Aligned with SDG 3: Good Health and Well-being
